note: SANITIZED SAMPLE. The real cache (data/calendar_cache.json) is gitignored because it contains private meeting titles. This file only documents the format: real meetings are pulled from Microsoft 365 via WorkIQ at author time, converted from UTC to local time, and cleaned of all-day/multi-day/cancelled events. calendar_client.py derives back-to-back / after-hours / lunch-break from the start/end times.
